guideHeroTitle: A Set for Precise Implant Positioning
guideHeroLead:
A set of guides and instruments
that helps transfer the digital plan accurately
into real implant placement.
guideHeroBullet1: Guides the drill along the planned position
guideHeroBullet2: Reduces deviations from the digital plan
guideHeroBullet3: Helps repeat the result from patient to patient
guideAdvantage1Text: The guides fix the drill position according to the digital plan.
guideAdvantage3Text: Supports tooth-, mucosa-, and bone-supported approaches.
guideDetailsTitle: From digital plan to clinical precision
guideDetailsLead:
The system guides the drill along the planned position.
The plan is transferred into real placement without deviations.
The result remains reproducible.
guideFeature4Value: Fluid delivery to the drilling zone
guideVideoOverlayText: A concise overview of the guided workflow, placement accuracy, and clinical logic of the system.
guideFinalCtaTitle: Ready to work according to a digital plan?
guideFinalCtaText: We will help match Surgical Guide to your clinical scenario.
